dryRun.description: Return mocked calendar, route, weather, and profile results without calling external providers.

larkIdentity.description: Lark identity used for calendar operations.

travel.description: Travel planner defaults used for route-aware outdoor reminders and trip preparation guidance.

originAddress.description: Default origin address used for route estimates.

defaultRouteMode.description: Default route mode for travel estimates.

arrivalBufferMinutes.description: Minutes to arrive before an outdoor event starts.

weather.description: Weather provider used by travel and business-trip reminders. Use the same QWeather API Host and credential environment as the weather-provider plugin.

apiHost.description: QWeather API Host from Console - Settings.

credentialEnv.description: Environment variable containing the QWeather API key or JWT token.

defaultRange.description: Optional GeoAPI search range, for example cn.

wellbeing.description: Sedentary wellbeing thresholds and reminder behavior.

minimumSedentaryDurationMinutes.description: Minimum sedentary duration before a nudge can be generated.

minimumConfidence.description: Minimum sensing confidence before a nudge can be generated.

cooldownMinutes.description: Minimum minutes between audible wellbeing nudges when prior context is supplied.

upcomingReminderHorizonMinutes.description: Calendar lookahead window for one concise upcoming-event reminder.

scheduler.description: Optional proactive calendar trigger scheduler. Disabled unless enabled is true.

enabled.description: Enable deterministic proactive calendar scanning and trigger dispatch.

startIntervalLoop.description: Start the scheduler interval loop at plugin registration time.

scanIntervalMs.description: Milliseconds between scheduler scans when the interval loop is enabled.

lookaheadHours.description: Future calendar scan horizon in hours.

timezone.description: IANA timezone used for local trigger times.

userId.description: Target user id for scheduler-produced InputEvent objects.

calendarId.description: Calendar id passed to calendar list scans.

statePath.description: JSON trigger state path for pending and dispatched records.

maxDispatchAttempts.description: Retry cap for failed trigger dispatches.

agentDispatch.description: Optional OpenClaw agent turn dispatch for scheduler-produced StructuredResponse reminders. A queued agent turn is treated as success; robot execution happens later through xiaopai-control.

enabled.description: Queue scheduler-produced StructuredResponse reminders into an OpenClaw agent session.

sessionKey.description: Target OpenClaw session key for proactive reminder turns, for example a Xiaopai/stack-chan session.

agentId.description: Optional OpenClaw agent id override for the scheduled reminder turn.

deliveryMode.description: Cron delivery mode for the scheduled agent turn. Defaults to none so Xiaopai voice rendering can be the primary output.

deviceId.description: Optional Xiaopai device id included in the stack-chan render envelope.

interrupt.description: Whether Xiaopai speech rendering should interrupt current playback.
